item.title: When is the next results date for Cigniti Technologies Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Cigniti Technologies Ltd is 05 May 2026. Time: May 04 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Spinaroo Commercial Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Spinaroo Commercial Ltd is 06 May 2026. Time: May 04 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Ampvolts Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Ampvolts Ltd is 08 May 2026. Time: May 04 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Aditya Birla Capital Q4 FY26: Profit Surge Masks Margin Pressure Concerns
item.description: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd., the diversified non-banking financial services arm of the Aditya Birla Group, reported a consolidated net profit of ₹1,129.16 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a robust 30.60% year-on-year growth and a 19.49% sequential increase. The financial services conglomerate, commanding a market capitalisation of ₹91,744 crores, delivered its strongest quarterly profit performance on record, driven by aggressive business expansion across its lending, insurance, and asset management verticals. Time: May 04 2026 09:01 PM IST

item.title: Ambuja Cements Q4 FY26: Tax Reversal Masks Operational Headwinds
item.description: Ambuja Cements Ltd., one of India's leading cement manufacturers and part of the diversified Adani Group, reported consolidated net profit of ₹1,830.15 crores for Q4 FY26 (January-March quarter), marking an exceptional 663.80% surge quarter-on-quarter and 78.47% growth year-on-year. However, the impressive headline figure conceals a more concerning operational reality driven primarily by a significant tax reversal rather than underlying business strength. Time: May 04 2026 09:01 PM IST

item.title: SG Mart Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Surge Masks Margin Pressures in Construction Play
item.description: SG Mart Ltd., a small-cap construction company, delivered a remarkable turnaround in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹41.47 crores—a stunning 286.13% surge quarter-on-quarter and 25.14% year-on-year growth. With a market capitalisation of ₹7,384 crores and current trading price of ₹558.20, the stock has declined 2.19% following the results announcement, suggesting investors are digesting the mixed signals beneath the headline numbers. Time: May 04 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: NACL Industries Q4 FY26: Marginal Loss Masks Weak Fundamentals as Agrochemical Firm Struggles
item.description: NACL Industries Ltd., a Hyderabad-based pesticides and agrochemicals manufacturer, reported a marginal consolidated net loss of ₹0.86 crores for Q4 FY26, a dramatic improvement from the ₹50.00 crores loss in Q4 FY25, yet the company's underlying fundamentals remain deeply concerning. With a market capitalisation of ₹3,797.00 crores and trading at ₹159.95 per share, the stock has declined 0.9% following the results announcement, reflecting investor scepticism despite the sequential recovery. Time: May 04 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: Mar-2026 Results Show Broad Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarter earnings season has delivered a notable improvement in corporate profitability, with 58.0% of the 425 companies declaring results reporting positive outcomes. This marks a significant uptick from the preceding quarters, reflecting a broad-based recovery across market capitalisation segments and sectors. Time: May 04 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Oriental Hotels Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns Amid Technical Weakness
item.description: Oriental Hotels Ltd., the hospitality company operating premium hotels under the Taj brand, reported a remarkable 66.98% year-on-year surge in consolidated net profit to ₹32.41 crores for Q4 FY26, marking its strongest quarterly performance in recent history. However, the stock has struggled significantly, declining 33.40% over the past year and currently trading at ₹98.03 with a market capitalisation of ₹1,799 crores. Despite the impressive quarterly numbers, investors remain cautious as the company grapples with technical headwinds, elevated valuation multiples, and weak return ratios that continue to raise questions about sustainable value creation. Time: May 04 2026 07:46 PM IST

item.title: Suryo Foods Q4 FY26: Losses Deepen as Operations Remain Dormant
item.description: Suryo Foods and Industries Ltd. reported a net loss of ₹0.36 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sharp deterioration from the ₹0.21 crores profit recorded in Q4 FY25. The micro-cap FMCG company, with a market capitalisation of ₹14.00 crores, continues to grapple with zero revenue operations whilst accumulating losses quarter after quarter. The stock, however, surged 9.86% to ₹21.94 on May 04, 2026, despite the concerning financial trajectory. Time: May 04 2026 07:46 PM IST

item.title: Exide Industries Q4 FY26: Profit Growth Masks Margin Pressures Amid Premium Valuation
item.description: Exide Industries Ltd., India's largest automotive battery manufacturer with a market capitalisation of ₹31,059 crores, reported a consolidated net profit of ₹215.25 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a 15.19% year-on-year increase but reflecting sequential growth moderation at 10.95%. The stock traded at ₹359.45 on May 04, 2026, down 0.32% from the previous close, as investors digested results that showcased revenue strength but persistent margin challenges. Time: May 04 2026 07:46 PM IST

item.title: Are IKIO Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: IKIO Technologies Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a strong recovery with a net profit of ₹16.49 crores and record revenue of ₹165.35 crores, but concerns remain due to low return ratios and stretched valuation multiples, suggesting investors should proceed with caution. Time: May 04 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Shera Energy Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Shera Energy Ltd's latest Q3 FY26 results show strong year-on-year profit growth of 110.31% to ₹7.55 crores and a 29.69% increase in net sales, but high debt levels and rising interest expenses pose significant financial risks. Overall, while revenue growth is positive, concerns about capital efficiency and debt servicing remain. Time: May 04 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Monolithisch India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Monolithisch India Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are strong, with a 55.21% increase in net sales and a 105.84% rise in net profit year-on-year. However, its high price-to-earnings ratio of 53x raises concerns about valuation sustainability despite impressive operational performance. Time: May 04 2026 07:11 PM IST
